zh.about 1140–about July 1203: 從大約1144年到1163年–大約1203年7月
zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife於從大約1144年到1163年出生在蘇格蘭費伏梅爾時，他的父親Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife45歲，母親Ada Huntingdon39歲。他於1160年12月25日與Ade Ela de Warenne在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1203年7月在蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.about 1140–about July 1203: 从大约1144年到1163年–大约1203年7月
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife于从大约1144年到1163年出生在苏格兰費伏梅爾时，他的父亲Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife45岁，母亲Ada Huntingdon39岁。他于1160年12月25日与Ade Ela de Warenne在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1203年7月在苏格兰，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife was born from about 1144 to 1163, in Methil, Fife, Scotland, his father, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, was 45 and his mother, Ada Huntingdon, was 39. He married Ade Ela de Warenne on 25 December 1160, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about July 1203, in Scotland, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife est né du environ 1144 au 1163, à Methil, Fife, Écosse, son père, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Ada Huntingdon, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Ade Ela de Warenne le 25 décembre 1160, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ juillet 1203, à Écosse, et a été enterré à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife von um 1144 bis 1163 in Methil, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife 45 und seine Mutter Ada Huntingdon 39. Er hat am 25. Dezember 1160 in Schottland, United Kingdom Ade Ela de Warenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um Juli 1203 in Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife è nato il da circa 1144 a 1163 nel Methil, Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Ada Huntingdon, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Ade Ela de Warenne il 25 dicembre 1160, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa luglio 1203, nel Scotland, e fu sepolto a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fifeがから約1144年まで1163年にスコットランドフィフメスイルで生まれた時，父Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fifeは45歳，母Ada Huntingdonは39歳であった。1160年12月25日にイギリススコットランドでAde Ela de Warenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1203年7月にスコットランドで死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife(이)가 대략 1144년 부터 1163년 까지 스컷랜드 피프 멧힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada Huntingdon(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1160년 12월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Ade Ela de Warenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1203년 7월 스컷랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

pt.1190: de 8 de janeiro de 1190 a 7 de janeiro de 1191
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife nasceu de aproximadamente 1144 a 1163, em Methil, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Ada Huntingdon, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Ade Ela de Warenne em 25 de dezembro de 1160, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente julho de 1203, em Scotland, e foi sepultado em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife родился с около 1144 по 1163 в местности метил, фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Huntingdon, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Ade Ela de Warenne 25 декабря 1160 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около июль 1203 г. в местности Шотландия и был похоронен в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.

es.1190: desde 8 de enero de 1190 hasta 7 de enero de 1191
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Duncan MacDuff 6th Earl Of Fife nació desde aproximadamente 1144 hasta 1163, en Methil, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Duncan "Donnchad" MacDuff 4th Earl of Fife, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Ada Huntingdon, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Ade Ela de Warenne el 25 de diciembre de 1160, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente julio de 1203, en Scotland, y fue sepultado en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.
